services.name: Standard Cleaning
services.description: Regular maintenance cleaning to keep your home fresh and tidy.
services.includes: Dusting, vacuuming, mopping, bathroom and kitchen cleaning

services.name: Deep Cleaning
services.description: Thorough top-to-bottom cleaning including baseboards, cabinets, ceiling fans, and more.
services.includes: Everything in Standard plus baseboards, cabinet faces, ceiling fans, window sills, mirrors

services.name: Move In / Move Out
services.description: Complete deep clean with additional features for property turnover.
services.includes: Full deep clean plus cabinet interiors, interior windows, window blinds, walls

services.name: Commercial & Office
services.description: Professional cleaning for businesses, offices, and commercial spaces.
services.includes: Tailored to your business needs — offices, lobbies, restrooms, break rooms

services.name: Construction & Real Estate
services.description: Post-construction cleanup and real estate showing preparation.
services.includes: Dust removal, debris cleanup, surface detailing, window cleaning

services.name: Church & Ministry
services.description: Cleaning services for houses of worship and ministry facilities.
services.includes: Sanctuary, fellowship halls, restrooms, classrooms, offices

services.name: Professional Organization
services.description: Decluttering and organizational services to bring order and peace to your space.
services.includes: Custom organizational solutions, closets, pantries, garages, storage areas
